title: Mărul tradițional românesc în sistem ecologic - un sistem integrat de conservarea a soiurilor de meri tradiționali din județul Sălaj
description: This project presents an integrated ecological system for conserving traditional Romanian apple varieties from Sălaj County by identifying heritage cultivars, creating a dynamic database, revitalizing orchards, and processing fruits into value-added products. It includes genetic and phenotypic characterization, individual tree tagging with transponders, farmer training in grafting techniques, and development of ecological orchard maintenance protocols.
